---
title: Information about the data
---

**The Large-Scale US Cohort (Wallen et al., 2022)**

* **BioProject Accession:** PRJNA834801
* **Link:** <https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/bioproject/PRJNA834801>
* **Details:** This contains the deep shotgun metagenomic sequencing data for the 724 individuals (490 Parkinson's patients and 234 neurologically healthy controls) from the Deep South of the United States.
